From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

This is a dynamic list and may never be able to satisfy particular standards for completeness. You can help by editing the page to add missing items, with references to reliable sources.

This is a list of erotic video games.

  565. ^ Steffen Schamberger; Michael (July 1999). "Wet Attack - The Empire Cums Back". PC Joker. Joker Verlag. pp. 66–69.

  567. ^ "Review: Wonderful Everyday - Hardcore Gamer". hardcoregamer.com. 2017-10-09. Retrieved 2023-05-28.
